headMarkup:
<!--reCaptcha v3-->
<script>
    document.addEventListener('grecaptchaSiteKey', (event) => {
    
        let script = document.createElement('script');
        script.addEventListener('load', () => {
            document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('grecaptchaJsLoaded'));
        });
        
        script.src = 'https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api.js?render=' + event.detail.siteKey;
        
        let s = document.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];
        s.parentNode.insertBefore(script, s);
    });
    
    document.addEventListener('grecaptchaExecute', (event) => {
        grecaptcha.ready(function() {
          grecaptcha.execute(event.detail.siteKey, {action: event.detail.action}).then(function(token) {
              document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('grecaptchaVerified', {detail: {response: token, action: event.detail.action}}));
          });
        });
    });
    
    document.addEventListener('grecaptchaReset', function() {
        grecaptcha.reset();
    }); 
</script>
<meta name="recaptcha-site-key" content="6LcHmGsqAAAAAJcytf4kuK239a7MXJqvXVwCWxhR">
label: main
